analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CSP:** PLTR $130 strike, 2026-06-18, 44 DTE, $4.45/$4.55, 0.23 delta, 28.7% annualized return

**Best CC:** AMZN $285 strike, 2026-06-18, 44 DTE, $6.60/$6.70, 0.35 delta, 20.3% annualized return (existing position)

**Best LEAPS:** None qualify - all have high IVP (65-91%) making them expensive to purchase

**Best Bull Call Spread:** None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across most names (PLTR 72%, NVDA 65%, MSFT 91%) creating good premium selling conditions but poor LEAPS buying opportunities.
